name: conform-patched-deps
description: Drop-in PM conformance fixture: pnpm patchedDependencies. is-odd@3.0.1 is patched via patches/is-odd@3.0.1.patch (declared in pnpm-workspace.yaml, the pnpm 9+ location). pnpm records the patch as a hash/path map in the lockfile; nub must frozen-read it as up to date and apply the patch (issue #15 is the bare-scalar-hash variant pnpm 10.x no longer writes).
